hooks.command: nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=d.get('content','');print(c) if c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true

{ nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=d.get('content','');print(c) if c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true; } && printf '
---
Context was compacted. If you discovered important insights, save them:
  nmem m add "<insight>" -t "Title" -i 0.8
'

input=$(cat); output=$(printf '%s' "$input" | rtk hook copilot 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -z "$output" ]; then exit 0; fi; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '%s' "$output" | jq -e '(.hookSpecificOutput.hookEventName // "") == "PreToolUse" and (.hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput.command // "") != ""' >/dev/null 2>&1; then rewritten=$(printf '%s' "$output" | jq -r '.hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput.command'); jq -n --arg reason "RTK rewrite required. Run this instead: $rewritten" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":$reason}}'; else printf '%s' "$output"; fi
